---
title: "Benjamin Valderrama"
from: markdown+emoji
format: html
css: styles.css
about:
        template: jolla
---

![](images/me.png){fig-align="center" width="293"}

::: {.d-flex .justify-content-center .gap-2 .flex-wrap}
<!-- Google Scholar -->

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary rounded-circle p-2"
     href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=ksAx1HEAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&authuser=1&sortby=pubdate"
     target="_blank"
     title="Google Scholar"> <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill" style="font-size:1.5rem;"></i> </a>

<!-- LinkedIn -->

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary rounded-circle p-2"
     href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/benjamin-valderrama-794664195/"
     target="_blank"
     title="LinkedIn"> <i class="bi bi-linkedin" style="font-size:1.5rem;"></i> </a>

<!-- Bluesky (custom SVG icon) -->

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary rounded-circle p-2"
     href="https://bsky.app/profile/bvalderrama.bsky.social"
     target="_blank"
     title="BlueSky"> <i class="bi bi-bluesky" style="font-size:1.5rem;"></i> </a>

<!-- CV Download -->

<a class="btn btn-outline-primary rounded-circle p-2"
     href="files/CV2026_BValderrama.pdf"
     download
     title="Download Full CV"> <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill" style="font-size:1.5rem;"></i> </a>

<!-- GitHub -->

<a class="btn btn-outline-dark rounded-circle p-2"
     href="https://github.com/Benjamin-Valderrama"
     target="_blank"
     title="GitHub"> <i class="bi bi-github" style="font-size:1.5rem;"></i> </a>
:::

<p style="text-align: center">
You can contact me at: contact\@bvalderrama.com
</p>

# Short Bio

I'm a [Computational Biologist]{.my_bold} :computer::dna: with seven years of research experience distilling biological insight from large and complex multidimensional datasets. I've worked across academia, industry and at their interface, as well as serving as a consultant and analyst for academic research groups.

In my PhD I focused on the balanced integration of global-scale multi-omics datasets with biologically-grounded analytical approaches to unravel the complexity of the [microbiome-gut-brain axis]{.my_bold}. My work was supervised by Professors John F. Cryan and Gerard Clarke at APC microbiome Ireland.

In my daily life I like reading books (mostly non-fiction), hiking, drinking coffee and doing 3D design and printing.

# Areas of research

::: bullet-list
-   Microbiome-gut-brain axis across global populations.
-   Microbiome's modulation of gut barrier integrity and its effects on gut-brain health.
-   Development of Probiotics and Psychobiotics.
:::
